# cloudtemple_public_cloud_vm_template (Data Source)

Used to retrieve a Public Cloud VM Instances template (OS image), by `id` or by `name`.

To query this datasource you will need the `public_cloud_vm_instances_read` role.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "cloudtemple_public_cloud_vm_availability_zone" "az" {
  name = "fr1-az01"
}

data "cloudtemple_public_cloud_vm_instance_family" "family" {
  name = "Development"
}

# Template names are not guaranteed unique across zones and families: combine
# the name with the server-side filters to select the right image. An ambiguous
# match fails with the candidate ids instead of silently picking one.
data "cloudtemple_public_cloud_vm_template" "os" {
  name                 = "Debian 13"
  availability_zone_id = data.cloudtemple_public_cloud_vm_availability_zone.az.id
  instance_family_id   = data.cloudtemple_public_cloud_vm_instance_family.family.id
}

output "template" {
  value = {
    id         = data.cloudtemple_public_cloud_vm_template.os.id
    os_family  = data.cloudtemple_public_cloud_vm_template.os.os_family
    os_version = data.cloudtemple_public_cloud_vm_template.os.os_version
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `availability_zone_id` (String) Availability zone ID, used to narrow the search when looking up by `name`.
- `id` (String) The ID of the template to retrieve. Conflicts with `name`.
- `instance_family_id` (String) Instance family ID, used to narrow the search when looking up by `name`.
- `name` (String) The name of the template to retrieve (e.g. `Rocky Linux 9`). Conflicts with `id`.

### Read-Only

- `categories` (List of String) The categories of the template.
- `compatible_families` (List of String) The IDs of the instance families this template is compatible with.
- `description_en` (String) The English description of the template.
- `disk_sizes_gb` (List of Number) The disk sizes (GB) provided by the template.
- `editor` (String) The template editor/publisher.
- `family` (String) The template family.
- `icon` (String) The template icon (data URI).
- `os_family` (String) The OS family of the template (e.g. `linux`).
- `os_name` (String) The OS name of the template (e.g. `Rocky Linux 9`).
- `os_version` (String) The OS version of the template.
- `template_type` (String) The template type.
- `version` (String) The template version.
